provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Road Traffic (Speed Control Devices) Regulations.

The device specified in the Schedule to these Regulations is approved and shall be used for purposes of ascertaining the speed at which a person is driving a motor vehicle or any other vehicle on a road or other public place. Schedule 1. Hand held radar (Tss-UK 15).
